birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests
